content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09B","process_rule":"1. Copy decision table into table J09B_temp where the tour starts with J09B.
2. Add ENTSCHEIDUNG column.
3. Classify meter reading type:
   - Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" when a HAUS has less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU".
   - SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU".
   - SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU".
   - SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU".
   - SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU".
4. JOIN table with EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN table with SALES_MASTER and NET_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare customer sales master data and net master data.
7. If sales customer data NOT empty:
   - Use sales customer data table entries.
   Else:
   - Use net data customer table entries.
8. Identify households with mandatory meter reading:
   - Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
9. Export these households to CSV:
   - File name: J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv.
   - Columns: Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No., HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL.
10. Send them to the internal team:
    - Email address: mandatory.reading@provider.com.
    - File path: <file path for J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv here>.
11. Export the final data except the MANDATORY_READING:
    - File name: J09B.csv.
    - Columns: Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No., HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL.
12. Send email with the CSV file to EVU:
    - Email address: meter.readings@evu.com.
    - File path: <path_to_exported_csv_file>.
13. Delete temporary table."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Copy decision table into table J09B_temp where the tour starts with J09B.
2. Add ENTSCHEIDUNG column.
3. Classify meter reading type:
   - Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" when a HAUS has less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU".
   - SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU".
   - SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU".
   - SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU".
   - SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU".
4. JOIN table with EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN table with SALES_MASTER and NET_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare customer sales master data and net master data.
7. If sales customer data NOT empty:
   - Use sales customer data table entries.
   Else:
   - Use net data customer table entries.
8. Identify households with mandatory meter reading:
   - Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
9. Export these households to CSV:
   - File name: J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv.
   - Columns: Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No., HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL.
10. Send them to the internal team:
    - Email address: mandatory.reading@provider.com.
    - File path: <file path for J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv here>.
11. Export the final data except the MANDATORY_READING:
    - File name: J09B.csv.
    - Columns: Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No., HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL.
12. Send email with the CSV file to EVU:
    - Email address: meter.readings@evu.com.
    - File path: <path_to_exported_csv_file>.
13. Delete temporary table.

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE HAUS LIKE 'J09B%'

{"success":true,"schema":"# Table: net_master
## column_name (type) description
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number
TITLE (TEXT) Title (Mr., Mrs., Dr., etc.)
FORENAME (TEXT) First name
SURNAME (TEXT) Last name/surname
STREET (TEXT) Street name
STREETNO (TEXT) Street number
CITY1 (TEXT) City name
CITY2 (TEXT) District/additional city information
POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code
EMAIL (TEXT) Email address

# Table: sales_master
## column_name (type) description
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number
TITLE (TEXT) Title (Mr., Mrs., Dr., etc.)
FORENAME (TEXT) First name
SURNAME (TEXT) Last name/surname
STREET (TEXT) Street name
STREETNO (TEXT) Street number
CITY1 (TEXT) City name
CITY2 (TEXT) District/additional city information
POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code
EMAIL (TEXT) Email address

# Table: decision_talbe
## column_name (type) description
HAUS (TEXT) House identifier
ANLAGE (TEXT) Installation/facility identifier
ABLEINH (TEXT) Reading unit identifier
TOUR (TEXT) Tour/route identifier
ME_MA_ID (TEXT) Meter/Measuring point ID
CITY1 (TEXT) City name
CITY2 (TEXT) District/additional city information
HOUSE_NUM1 (INTEGER) House/building number
POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number

# Table: eabl
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number
Geplante Ableseart (INTEGER) Planned reading type
MR type (TEXT) Meter reading type code
MR TYPE TEXT (TEXT) Meter Reading type description
MR category (TEXT) Meter reading category
ISTABLART_TXT (TEXT) Actual reading type description (SAP)
LOGIKZW (TEXT) Logic indicator
KENNZIFF (TEXT) Identification number
Record created on (TEXT) Record creation date
Object changed on (TEXT) Object modification date

# Table: eablg
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number
Installation (TEXT) Installation identifier
Meter Reading reason (INTEGER) Meter reading reason code
MR Reason - Text (TEXT) Meter reading reason description
Scheduled MR Date (TEXT) Scheduled meter reading date
Meter Reading unit (TEXT) Meter reading unit
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No..1 (INTEGER) Secondary/duplicate Meter Reading Document Number

# Table: eanl
## column_name (type) description
Installation (TEXT) Installation identifier
Installation type (TEXT) Type of installation
Record created on (TEXT) Record creation date
Object changed on (TEXT) Object modification date
SPARTE_TEXT (TEXT) Division/sector description
AKLASSE (TEXT) Customer class code
AKLASSE_TEXT (TEXT) Customer class description
TARIFTYP (TEXT) Tariff type code
TARIFTYP_TEXT (TEXT) Tariff type description
BRANCHE (TEXT) Industry/sector code
BRANCHE_TEXT (TEXT) Industry/sector description
ABLEINH (TEXT) Reading unit identifier
ME_MA_ID (TEXT) Meter/Measuring point ID
HAUS (TEXT) House identifier

# Table: process_rules
## column_name (type) description
process_rule_id (TEXT) PRIMARY KEY - Process rule identifier
process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description"}

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_talbe WHERE HAUS LIKE 'J09B%'
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'KSA' WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM eanl WHERE eanl.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR) < 3
SELECT * FROM eanl LIMIT 5

args.sqlite_command: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM eanl WHERE HAUS = 'QToeCkeUeWDVZeAEAGcaNSIm+ncTqDbFZXFIWmT'
SELECT HAUS, COUNT(*) as equnr_count FROM J09B_temp GROUP BY HAUS LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM J09B_temp LIMIT 5
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM decision_talbe
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM decision_talbe WHERE HAUS LIKE 'J09B%'
SELECT DISTINCT HAUS FROM decision_talbe LIMIT 20
SELECT DISTINCT TOUR FROM decision_talbe LIMIT 20
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_temp
CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_talbe WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'KSA' WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM eanl WHERE eanl.ABLEINH = J09B_temp.ABLEINH) < 3
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 >= 500 AND HOUSE_NUM1 <= 599
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 >= 900 AND HOUSE_NUM1 <= 999
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld')
SELECT * FROM J09B_temp LIMIT 5
SELECT HAUS, COUNT(*) as equnr_count FROM eanl GROUP BY HAUS LIMIT 10
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'KSA' WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM J09B_temp t2 WHERE t2.HAUS = J09B_temp.HAUS) < 3
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0
SELECT * FROM eablg LIMIT 5

args.sqlite_command: SELECT J09B_temp.ANLAGE, eablg.Installation FROM J09B_temp JOIN eablg ON J09B_temp.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation LIMIT 5
CREATE TABLE J09B_joined AS SELECT J09B_temp.*, eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." as MR_Doc_No FROM J09B_temp JOIN eablg ON J09B_temp.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation
SELECT * FROM J09B_joined LIMIT 5
SELECT * FROM sales_master LIMIT 5

CREATE TABLE J09B_with_sales AS SELECT J09B_joined.*, sales_master.TITLE as SALES_TITLE, sales_master.FORENAME as SALES_FORENAME, sales_master.SURNAME as SALES_SURNAME, sales_master.STREET as SALES_STREET, sales_master.STREETNO as SALES_STREETNO, sales_master.CITY1 as SALES_CITY1, sales_master.CITY2 as SALES_CITY2, sales_master.POST_CODE1 as SALES_POST_CODE1, sales_master.EMAIL as SALES_EMAIL FROM J09B_joined LEFT JOIN sales_master ON J09B_joined.EQUNR = sales_master.EQUNR

CREATE TABLE J09B_with_net AS SELECT J09B_with_sales.*, net_master.TITLE as NET_TITLE, net_master.FORENAME as NET_FORENAME, net_master.SURNAME as NET_SURNAME, net_master.STREET as NET_STREET, net_master.STREETNO as NET_STREETNO, net_master.CITY1 as NET_CITY1, net_master.CITY2 as NET_CITY2, net_master.POST_CODE1 as NET_POST_CODE1, net_master.EMAIL as NET_EMAIL FROM J09B_with_sales LEFT JOIN net_master ON J09B_with_sales.EQUNR = net_master.EQUNR
SELECT * FROM J09B_with_net LIMIT 3

CREATE TABLE J09B_final AS SELECT HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, MR_Doc_No, CASE WHEN SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_TITLE ELSE NET_TITLE END as TITLE, CASE WHEN SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_FORENAME ELSE NET_FORENAME END as FORENAME, CASE WHEN SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_SURNAME ELSE NET_SURNAME END as SURNAME, CASE WHEN SALES_STREET IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_STREET ELSE NET_STREET END as STREET, CASE WHEN SALES_STREETNO IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_STREETNO ELSE NET_STREETNO END as STREETNO, CASE WHEN SALES_CITY1 IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_CITY1 ELSE NET_CITY1 END as CITY1, CASE WHEN SALES_CITY2 IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_CITY2 ELSE NET_CITY2 END as CITY2, CASE WHEN SALES_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_POST_CODE1 ELSE NET_POST_CODE1 END as POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN SALES_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_EMAIL ELSE NET_EMAIL END as EMAIL FROM J09B_with_net
SELECT * FROM J09B_final LIMIT 3
SELECT * FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND "Record created on" LIKE '2024%' LIMIT 5

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE mandatory_equnr AS SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND "Record created on" LIKE '2024%' INTERSECT SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND "Record created on" LIKE '2023%'
SELECT * FROM mandatory_equnr LIMIT 5
UPDATE J09B_final SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM mandatory_equnr)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM J09B_final WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." as "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_final WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

args.email: Please find attached the list of households with mandatory meter readings for process J09B.

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." as "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_final WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG != 'MANDATORY_READING'

args.email: Please find attached the final data for process J09B (excluding mandatory readings).

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_temp
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_joined
